item.title: Deadliest jobs in America revealed
item.description: The United States Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that there were more than 5,000 deadly work injuries recorded in the nation in 2024.

item.title: US economy grew slower than expected in fourth quarter
item.description: The U.S. economy grew at a rate of 1.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, according to an estimate released on Friday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

item.title: Fed's favored inflation gauge showed consumer price growth remained elevated in December
item.description: The Commerce Department released the PCE inflation report on Friday, which showed the Fed's favored inflation gauge remained elevated as consumers dea...

item.title: US businesses shift away from China under Trump tariffs
item.description: China's trade with U.S. midsize businesses plummeted 20% as Trump tariffs hit 37.4%, forcing companies to shift suppliers to Southeast Asia and beyond...

item.title: Trump admin ramps up effort to revive coal industry as power demand surges
item.description: The Trump administration is looking to extend the useful life of coal-fired power plants to boost the nation's energy security amid rising demand from...
